line: - kept the existing comprehensive structure since it already covered the requested sections
- tightened install docs so they match the actual installer behavior in `install.sh:1`
- added copy-pasteable installer variants for `--dest`, `--easy-mode`, and `--uninstall`
- fixed the quick-start checkpoint example so it matches the real `checkpoint-kill` behavior from `crates/saw-daemon/src/alerter.rs:145`
- CLI command surface matches docs via `saw --help`, `saw watch --help`, `saw status --help`, `saw tui --help`, `saw config --help`, `saw hook --help`
- local install instructions work with `cargo install --path . --locked`
- the README still says `Intended license: MIT` because there is no top-level license file yet; I did not invent one
GROVE_LESSONS: Verified docs against live CLI/help output and installer behavior before finalizing examples.

items: Verified docs against live CLI/help output and installer behavior before finalizing examples.
